\tzpentry{ID4503}{Lagrangian Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4503 introduces Lagrangian Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \partial_\mu\left(\frac{\partial\mathcal{L}}{\partial(\partial_\mu\psi)}\right) - \frac{\partial\mathcal{L}}{\partial\psi} = 0, \end{equation}
